title: ASR Outdoor American Flag Fixed Blade Hunting Knife Patriotic Gift Wolf Design
description:
This ASR Outdoor hunting knife features a majestic design with a beautiful wolf overlaid with the American Flag, making this a great patriotic gift for men. The wolf is also depicted on the handle of the blade, and the pommel is shaped like a wolf’s head, perfect for any knife enthusiast’s collection. The knife is designed for display but also features an ergonomic handle that will keep the blade from slipping during use. Ergonomic handles are great for hunters and those who rely on their blades being easy and comfortable to use in the field

Key Features

  • ERGONOMIC HANDLE - The knife is designed for display, but also features an ergonomic handle that will keep the blade from slipping during use. Ergonomic handles are great for hunters and those who rely on their blades being easy and comfortable to use in the field.
  • STRAIGHT-BACK BLADE - In addition to being a great collector’s item, the ASR Outdoor hunting knife features a straight-back blade that is particularly popular for survival-style knives because it is excellent for slicing since the majority of the blade is simple to maintain along a cut line. They are also easy to sharpen since they only feature a single curve along the front.
  • IDEAL SIZE FOR DISPLAY - Each knife measures 13.5” in length, making it the perfect size for a knife display case or collection shelf. The stainless steel blade itself features a Damascus steel design that gives the knife a classic Damascus hunting knife look.
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Material: stainless steel that won’t rust; Colors: American flag/wolf howling, assorted; Dimensions: 13.5” overall length; Plastic sheath included; Designed for display

Product Specifications
